code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a monument (or related entities) into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # simple helper to format dates (strip possible quotes)
    def fmt_date(d: str) -> str:
        return d.strip('"')

    # mapping from predicate to a textual clause generator
    clause_funcs = {
        "category": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "location": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "municipality": lambda s, o: f"{s} lies in the municipality of {o}",
        "state": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the state of {o}",
        "district": lambda s, o: f"{s} is situated in the district of {o}",
        "established": lambda s, o: f"{s} was established on {fmt_date(o)}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {fmt_date(o)}",
        "inaugurationDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was inaugurated on {fmt_date(o)}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "owningOrganisation": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "dedicatedTo": lambda s, o: f"{s} is dedicated to {o}",
        "designer": lambda s, o: f"{s} was designed by {o}",
        "material": lambda s, o: f"{s} is made of {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{s} has ethnic group {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language spoken is {o}",
        "religion": lambda s, o: f"The predominant religion is {o}",
        "nearestCity": lambda s, o: f"The nearest city is {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency used is {o}",
        "largestCity": lambda s, o: f"The largest city is {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"The leader is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"The leader holds the title of {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"The capital is {o}",
        "legislature": lambda s, o: f"The legislature is {o}",
        "nativeName": lambda s, o: f"The native name is {o}",
        "hasToItsNorth": lambda s, o: f"{s} has to its north {o}",
        "hasToItsSouthwest": lambda s, o: f"{s} has to its southwest {o}",
        "hasToItsWest": lambda s, o: f"{s} has to its west {o}",
        "hasToItsSoutheast": lambda s, o: f"{s} has to its southeast {o}",
    }

    clauses = []
    for t in triples:
        func = clause_funcs.get(t.predicate)
        if func:
            clauses.append(func(t.subject, t.object))
        else:
            # fallback generic phrasing
            clauses.append(f"{t.subject} {t.predicate} {t.object}")

    # join clauses into a fluent sentence
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."
    # Capitalise first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
